session.user:
Run the following command from /home/runner/work/erk/erk and report results:
make fast-ci
Report any failures or confirm all passing.
session.assistant: I'll run the `make fast-ci` command and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run fast CI check (pytest, type checking, linting)

session.tool_result:

session.assistant:
The `make fast-ci` command **failed** due to one issue:
**Summary:** - Lint: PASSED - Format Check: PASSED - Prettier Check: PASSED - Markdown Check: PASSED - **Exec Reference Check: FAILED** - Type Checking (ty): PASSED - Unit Tests (erk): 5468 passed - Unit Tests (erk-dev): 136 passed - Unit Tests (erk-statusline): 112 passed - Unit Tests (erkbot): 114 passed
**Failure Details:**
The exec reference documentation is out of date:
``` FAIL: .claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md is out of date Run 'erk-dev gen-exec-reference-docs' to regenerate it. ```
**Location:** `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/.claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md`
To fix this, the `erk-dev gen-exec-reference-docs` command needs to be run to regenerate the reference documentation.
